# Adbnik v1.2.0

## Highlights

- **Help menu:** Quick links to the **project website**, **user guide** (F1), **GitHub**, and **PyPI**, in addition to **About**.
- **Guide:** The static site’s **User guide** home page now includes **ADB and scrcpy on your PC** (PATH, full paths, or a portable folder + **Preferences**). Guide nav bars include **GitHub** next to **PyPI** for consistency with the landing page.
- **Preferences:** Clearer explanation of how executable paths work when adb/scrcpy are not on `PATH`.

**Full changelog:** [CHANGELOG.md — 1.2.0](https://github.com/nvnkennedy/adbnik/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
